title: coap_keys.c: integer underflow in buffer safety margin check
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c
Line: 677

Buffer safety check can underflow:
```c
if (off > buf_size - 100) {
    break;
}
```

If buf_size < 100, the subtraction wraps around to a very large value (unsigned underflow), and the condition is never true, allowing buffer overwrite.

Should be:
```c
if (off + 100 > buf_size) {
```

Impact: SECURITY - potential buffer overflow if buffer is smaller than 100 bytes.

Category: SECURITY - buffer overflow
